temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, chaotic scene, a small, blonde-haired boy in a grey shirt is being forcefully restrained by an older man. The boy struggles violently, his face contorted in fear and distress as he screams and reaches out desperately. (Storyline: This opening scene immediately establishes a traumatic and violent event, showing a child being forcibly restrained, setting a tense and disturbing tone for the narrative.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, terrified, and pleading. 2) Background sounds: Sounds of a physical struggle, grunting, and a high-pitched, distressed scream.)
(00:04-00:05) The older man, who has glasses and a white beard, forcefully holds the boy's arms behind his back. The boy continues to struggle and cry, his face filled with terror as he is pinned down. (Storyline: The scene intensifies the boy's helplessness and the man's forceful control, escalating the sense of danger and abuse.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Desperate and terrified. 2) Background sounds: The boy's continued screaming and sounds of a struggle.)
